## [00:00 - 01:05]

Here's the tough list to confront, the unsold. I want you to make a list and a file for everyone that you have touched and not sold. People you have not sold personally over the years. Let's start with yesterday. Who didn't you not sell last month? How about last year? Two years ago. See, what we're doing is we're getting your attention on all the prospects out there. And probably what's happening to you right now is, oh my gosh, there's so many people I could be talking to right now. That's the point. Now, when you build this unsold list, the first run at it is just the names. Okay, now, where are they? Who are they? Then you're going to start having to do the work about how do I get in contact with these people. This might be where you want to get an assistant. You might want to get your spouse involved. Hey, get your kids involved. They need a job. There's no reason to give them an Xbox without them contributing back to the family. Build the list. What do we have so far?
